hero.title: Find the Right Doctor
hero.subtitle: Search by symptom, specialty, or doctor name

search.emptySubtitle: Try a different symptom or specialty

eligibility.cashlessBody: {insurer} is a cashless partner. You can avail treatment without upfront payment — TPA will settle directly with the hospital.
eligibility.cashlessPoint2: ✓ Emergency admissions can be intimated within 24h
eligibility.cashlessPoint3: ✓ Room rent capping as per policy terms
eligibility.noCashlessBody: {insurer} is not in our cashless network. You will need to pay out of pocket and submit a reimbursement claim.
eligibility.noCashlessPoint1: • Collect all original bills and receipts
eligibility.noCashlessPoint2: • Discharge summary and case papers needed for claim
eligibility.helpdeskBody: For pre-authorization and TPA queries, visit the Insurance Desk (Ground Floor) or call Ext. 1050

documents.heading: Documents to bring — {visitType}
documents.tipBody: Keep scanned copies on your phone (Google Drive / DigiLocker) for quick access at the hospital desk.
